A test script to verify object identity comparison in JavaScript.

# Purpose
This code is a simple script that demonstrates object creation and comparison in JavaScript. It creates two object instances, `x` and `y`, using the `Object` constructor with the string "abc". The variables `b` and `c` are then assigned the values of `x` and `y`, respectively. The `assert` statement checks that `c` is not equal to `b`, illustrating that even though `x` and `y` are created with the same string, they are distinct objects in memory. This script highlights the behavior of object identity and comparison in JavaScript.
